title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, exit/return to EQ, changes are present
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes persist after exiting and returning to the EQ screen without saving
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Modify one or more EQ band sliders (e.g., adjust bass or treble)
Do NOT tap Save or Apply
Exit the EQ screen by tapping the back arrow (←) to return to Audio Settings
Alternatively, close the app or kill the process
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app (if closed)
Navigate back to Home → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: The unsaved custom EQ changes should be discarded, and the EQ should revert to the previously saved settings or default flat profile.
